title: Supreme Court declines to interfere with Madras HC order on warning labels for plastic packaged products
description: The Supreme Court on Monday declined to interfere with a Madras High Court order directing that plastic-packaged products carry warning labels stating that they “may contain Micro/Nano Plastics” [Pet Packaging Association for Clean Environment vs. G Subramania Koushik].The High Court had asked the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) and other authorities to mandate red, bold labels on Polyethylene Terephthalate (PET) bottled water and plastic-packaged sugar and salt after noting
